title: Community-Based COVID-19 Testing: Barriers, Solutions, and Next Steps (English)
author: RADx-UP

description: This community-facing summary accompanies the policy paper, Scaling Up Equitable Access to Community-Based COVID-19 Testing: Strategies from the RADx-UP Initiative.
